raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht runnaja tee us to
Kehniku no Affirtjas / un fazzija:
Tee Pagani/ ko tu effi ais-
weddïs/ un lizzis Samarijas
Pilsfahtr̄s dshwoht/ ne finna to
Teesu ta Deewa tahs paschas
Semmes/ tadeht irr wiꞥſch starp
teem Lauwas fuhtijs/ un raugi/
tee nokanj tohs/ tapehz ka tee to
Teesu ta Deewa tahs Semmes
ne finna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad pawehleja tas Keh-
nisch no Affirijas / fazzidams:
Noweddeet us turren weenu no
teem Preestereem/ ko juhs no tur-
renes effat aiswedduschi/ ka tee
staiga / un tur dshwo/ uu to
Teesu ta Deewa tahs Semmes
mahza.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta nahze weens no teem
Preestereem/ kas no Samarijas
bija aiswesti/ un dshwoja Be-
telē/ un mahzija tohs / ka bij to
KUNGU bihtees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ikkurra Tauta dar-
rija jew paschai Deewus/ un us
zehle tohs Augstumu Nammo̅s/
ko tee no Samarijas bij darrij-
schi/ ikkurra Tauta favds Pils-
fahtr̄s/ kur tee dshweja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tee Laudis no Bave-
les darrija Sukot-Benotn / un
tee Laudis no Kutäs darrija
Nergelu/un tee Laudis no Cema-
ta darrija Asimu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Awitert darrija
Niveafu / un Tartaku/ un tee
Sewarwitert fadedsinaja favus
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Dehtus tam Adramelekam un
Anamelekam/ teem Deeveem no
Sewarwaim ar Uggunt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee bihjajahs arridsan
to KUNGU / un darrija few
Preesterus no teem wiffsemuna-
keein Laudin/ kas preekſch teem
Augstumu Nammo̅s to Darbu
darrija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee bihjajahs to KUNG-
GU/ un kalpoja arridsan jaweem
Deeweemi/ pehz ikkurras Tautas
Teesu/ no kurrenes tee bija ais-
westi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un lihds fchai paschai
Deenai darra tee pehz to pirmu
Eeraddumu/ ka tee ned̄s to KUNG-
GU bibstahs/ ned̄s darra pehz
winzu Likkumeim / un pehz
winzu Teesahn/ ned̄s pehz tahs
Bauslibas/ ned̄s pehz to Bauſli/
ko tas KUNGGS Jehkaba Behr-
neem pawehleja/ kam wiꞥſch to
Wahrdu Israëls Deve.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tatschu bij tas KUNGē
ar teem weenu Derribu darriēs/
un teem pawehlejs / fazzidans:
Jums ne buhs zittus Deewus
bittees/ ned̄s preekſch teem klan-
nitees/ ned̄s teem falpoht / ned̄s
teem uppureht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tam KUNGAM/
kas juhs no Egiptes-Geimmes
isweddïs ar feelu Spehku/ un is-
steeptu Eskonu / to buhs jums
bihtees/ un preekſch ta buhsjums
klannitees/ un tam buhs jums
uppureht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tohs Likkumus/ uu
tahs Teefas/ un to Bauſlibu/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
